name: ship-gun-deck
summary: A row of cannons on either side, muzzles to the gun ports — powder monkeys' paths worn down the centerline, shot-garlands stacked beside each piece.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: long narrow rectangle, guns to port and starboard

primary_palette.note: gun battery, paired stations along the hull
central powder tub serving adjacent guns

story_prompts: general quarters — crews running out the guns, a sail on the horizon
after a battle — broken guns, wounded among the carriages
mutiny: guns turned inboard, pointed at the quarterdeck above
abandoned ghost-ship, guns still loaded and primed after a century

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: dim (0.15-0.25), lantern pools between guns, shafts from gun ports if open

anti_patterns: guns face outward to ports — never inward to the centerline (except for mutiny)
leave the centerline clear — powder monkeys run the full length
pair each gun with its shot-garland and tackle; isolated guns read as broken
